meta.description: Global Conflict Escalation Monitor — Nuclear & Conventional Warfare Tracking

creation_rules: Create tracker if 3+ mentions across 2+ independent sources within 6 hours
Set base_rate at 10%, adjust based on signals
Use generic zone/country name as tracker ID
Add to dashboard immediately after creation
Report new tracker creation in next briefing

coupling.description: Correlation multipliers — when a tracker reaches CRITICAL/IMMINENT, it boosts connected trackers. Applied BEFORE global score calculation. Weights calibrated so coupling nudges scores toward realistic systemic risk without double-counting already-hot conflicts.
